## Type

- [ ] New agent
- [ ] New skill
- [ ] Improvement to existing agent/skill
- [ ] Documentation / repo meta
- [ ] Other

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read the [Contributing Guide](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] `name` field is lowercase-hyphenated, starts with a letter, max 64 chars (e.g., `my-agent-name`)
- [ ] Filename (agents) or folder name (skills) matches the `name` field exactly
- [ ] All required frontmatter fields are present (`name`, `description`, `metadata.displayName`, `metadata.categories`)
- [ ] Body contains behavioral instructions (agents) or procedural steps (skills), not marketing copy
- [ ] Description is under 1024 characters
- [ ] Only one `#` heading per file — use `##` and below for sections
- [ ] Cross-references (`worksWellWith*`) are bidirectional where applicable *(CI warns but does not block)*
- [ ] I have checked for duplicate entries
